xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfRegisteredOfficeOfCom: “Praj Tower”, S. No. 274 & 275/2, Bhumkar Chowk- Hinjewadi Road, Hinjewadi, Pune – 411 057.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfCorporateOfficeOfComp: “Praj Tower”, S. No. 274 & 275/2, Bhumkar Chowk- Hinjewadi Road, Hinjewadi, Pune – 411 057.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NotesGeneralDisclosureExplanat: The policies governing Company’s responsible business conduct are available on the Company’s website. These policies cover all the stakeholders and the policies also cover grievance redressal mechanism. Refer link below :- https ://www.praj.net/investors-type/policies/
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfBusinessActivity: Manufacture of other Special- Purpose Machinery
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ProductOrServiceSoldByTheEntit: Bioenergy Plants - 1st and 2nd Generation ethanol and renewable bio-gas that can substitute fossil fuels and promote Sustainable Decarbonization through Circular Bio-Economy

Engineering Businesses - Critical Process Equipment & Skids, Processes & Systems, Brewery Beverages Plants Water and Wastewater Plants and Water systems, modular process systems and value added services related thereto
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ABriefOnTypesOfCustomersExplan: Company offers customized plants, equipment & technology solutions majorly to industrial customers. Some of our customers include PSU Companies and large conglomerates.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheHoldingOrSubsidiaryAs: Praj Far East Co. Ltd., Thailand
Praj Far East Philippines Ltd. Inc., The Philippines
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Governance policies when not in place can lead to major impact on sustainability of the organization
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Strong policy-oriented governance structure & implementation structure in place
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Ethical behaviour is an integrated part of Praj’s culture and form core part of most of the policies
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Whistle Blower Policy and its deployment. The policy is applicable for its employees, vendors, and channel partners
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Employee and workforce wellbeing remains crucial for achieving sustainability & success of the organization
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: HR Policies conducive to welfare promotion. Management strategy to move away from Labor Relations to Human Capital Development
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Challenges integrity of the organization. Has legal implications
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: The culture of care and trust has been embedded in the organization. It has been made part of various policies. Trainings on the same is taken periodically
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: For us sustainability in supply chain provides opportunity to enhance operations’ sustainability and in-turn increase opportunities to achieve lower TAT with quality for our customers
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Procurement from Green Certified vendors and MSME is preferred
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Data and IT infra being the backbone of the business, Cyber Security if not strengthened, will impact business’s confidential information and sustainability
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Policy and deployment including Cyber Security Assurance Framework
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Climate Action is prime importance for Praj. Through its business offerings Praj is creating opportunities for its customer to reduce impacts of Climate Change
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheEntityHasNotApplic: There are no separate procedures available, policies include the procedures.
There are no separate procedures available, policies include the procedures.
There are no separate procedures available, policies include the procedures.
There are no separate procedures available, policies include the procedures.
There are no separate procedures available, policies include the procedures.

There are no separate procedures available, policies include the procedures.
There are no separate procedures available, policies include the procedures.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:SpecificCommitmentsGoalsAndTar: 1. Reduce its Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions intensity to 50% of base year 2021 by 2035. 2. Achieve 60% increase training hours per individual per year from base year 2020 by 2030 3. Achieve 5000 hrs per year as employee contribution to social cause through internal mechanism of Personal Social Responsibility of doing activities on ground.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PerformanceOfTheEntityAgainstT: 1. Measures such as open access solar for all offices and factories in Maharashtra state is under process. This will substantially reduce emission intensity. 2. Increased yearly training to cover maximum number of employees. 3. Facilitation through partner NGOs to increase voluntary activities.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StatementByDirectorResponsible: For detail statement of our Director (Resources) please refer below link : https ://www.praj.net/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/sustainability-management-system1.pdf
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheHighestAuthorityRe: Mr. Sachin Raole CFO and Director – Resources Phone No. 020-71802000
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfSpecifiedCommitteeOfT: A working Committees consist of members from all functions at each location with their HOD as champion of Sustainability. They work under the overall guidance of CFO.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfOtherCommitteeFor: Praj has established a system for improvement of significant aspects of Business Responsibility Principles. CEO & MD and Members of the Board undertake broad planning for improvement of these significant aspects and release documented targets. Heads of all locations carry out detailed planning and initiate improvement as per the directions. Quarterly reports are received from all its locations in India and abroad.

Praj has established a system for improvement of significant aspects of Business Responsibility Principles. CEO & MD and Members of the Board undertake broad planning for improvement of these significant aspects and release documented targets. Heads of all locations carry out detailed planning and initiate improvement as per the directions. Quarterly reports are received from all its locations in India and abroad.

CEO & MD and Members of the Board undertake broad planning for improvement of these significant aspects and release documented targets. Heads of all locations carry out detailed planning and initiate improvement as per the directions. Quarterly reports are received from all its locations in India and abroad.

CEO & MD and Members of the Board undertake broad planning for improvement of these significant aspects and release documented targets. Heads of all locations carry out detailed planning and initiate improvement as per the directions. Quarterly reports are received from all its locations in India and abroad.

Heads of all locations carry out detailed planning and initiate improvement as per the directions. Quarterly reports are received from all its locations in India and abroad.

These are reviewed quarterly by the Head of the Divisions. CEO & MD / Board undertake annual review and give feedback and encouragement. CEO/Board take care of any budgetary or policy needs that are necessary for the improvements planned.

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheAgencyIfTheEntityCarr: independent assessments are conducted by certifying agencies while conducting ISO certification audits. Company has ISO certifications such as ISO 9001, ISO 45001, ISO 14001
independent assessments are conducted by certifying agencies while conducting ISO certification audits. Company has ISO certifications such as ISO 9001, ISO 45001, ISO 14001
independent assessments are conducted by certifying agencies while conducting ISO certification audits. Company has ISO certifications such as ISO 9001, ISO 45001, ISO 14001

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TopicsOrPrinciplesCoveredUnder: Environment Sustainability, Cyber security, Health and Safety, Code of Conduct
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AntiCorruptionOrAntiBriberyPol: Company’s Code of Conduct policy covers anti-corruption and anti-bribery clause. The policies are applicable to Board & Senior Management, Employees and Suppliers are strictly complied, with. Refer link : https ://www.praj.net/investors-type/policies/
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfImprovementsInEnviron: Sustainable Aviation Fuel - Praj brings to the table proven expertise in modularized solutions, integration services for complete projects and technology for production of low carbon isobutanol and ethanol from conventional bio- sourced feedstock. Research Assignment for others – Research work related to specific technologies improving the environmental and impacts of product and processes.

Renewable Natural Gas - Developed advanced bio methanation technology based on proprietary microbiological pre-treatment for production of compressed biogas from Agri residues and press mud. Developed and commercialized a proprietary renewable gas technology – RenGasTM and has commissioned over 40 plants in India of the same. Highest yielding BioGas with 30% lower operating costs due to its unique microbial culture. The process creates value-added manure with organic soil as a byproduct while advanced biogas cleaning techniques give pure methane. Development of biodegradable plastics - (poly lactic acid and poly hydroxy alkenoate) pilot plant is being commissioned to demonstrate the technology at 100 MTA scale. This development will address the issue of single use plastic menace polluting the environment.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesInPlaceToS: Disposed through scrap merchant by authorised recycler. Annual Undertaking is taken from the recycler.
Disposed through scrap merchant by authorised recycler. Annual Undertaking is taken from the recycler.
Disposed through scrap merchant by authorised recycler. Annual Undertaking is taken from the recycler.
Reuse of packing material such as wood for repacking.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMechanismAvailableToR: We have a complaint box available for any grievances. Additionally, they can approach the HR team member at any time if they need to discuss any concerns or issues.
Grievances are raised through verbal or phone communication with HR team members. Grievances are addressed through internal procedures.
Employees can connect through phone or email with the BU Human Resource team or Corporate HR team.
Grievances are raised through verbal or phone or email communication with dedicated officer. Grievances are addressed through internal procedures.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOccupationalHealthAnd: Company is ISO 14001 & ISO 45001 compliant. A well-documented EOHS (Environmental, Occupational, Health & Safety) policy is in place. One of the objectives of this policy is to provide safe & healthy working conditions for the prevention of work-related injury and ill health.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DesclosureOfTheProcessesUsedTo: Company follows procedures for recording of unsafe acts, unsafe conditions & near misses. Audits are conducted at regular intervals.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMeasuresTakenByTheE: Company’s policy on EOHS (Environmental, Occupational, Health & Safety) strengthens the objective of providing safe & healthy working conditions for the prevention of work-related injury and ill health. Strict adherence to the objectives of this policy along with adoption of ISO 14001 :2015 and ISO 45001 ensure a safe and healthy work place. Necessary trainings are imparted to employees, business associates and interested parties to further strengthen the EOHS policy.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionTa: • Implementation of Operational Control Procedures at sites • Implementation of Monthly Safety Motivational Programs • Uniform safety systems implemented at sites • Adherence to compliance and statutory requirements • Monitoring and control through audits from external certifying agencies
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesForIdentif: Key stakeholders are identified on the basis of direct or indirect impact, they have, on the business performance or financial health of the organization. They can also be directly or indirectly influenced by the corporate decisions made by the organization. These stakeholders play very crucial role in the growth of the organization.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: 1. Internal communication through email platforms- Praj Connect, Corporate Communication 2. Quarterly Interactions by CEO
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Keep employees abreast with happenings in economy, business environment, Company specific achievements including business performance of organization.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: 1. Annual Report, Press Releases 2. Investor presentations 3. Corporate website 4. Quarterly & Annual results 5. Analysts/Investors’ call, Transcripts/Recordings 6. Participation in investor conference
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Investors prefer to invest in the organizations that deliver consistent performance, that are socially and environmentally responsible, follow good governance.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: Face to Face meetings- plant visits, Trade Shows/conferences Electronic communication- Emails, messages Social Media- LinkedIn, Facebook, Twitter
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Keep customers updated on latest developments, new technologies etc.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheInternalMechanismsI: Grievances are registered with Human Resource department which in turn resolves the grievance in line with set internal procedures. In addition, grievances can also be raised through ‘Vigil Mechanism and Whistle Blower Policy’. The Audit Committee then appropriately and expeditiously investigates all such grievances in line with the policy for a quick resolution.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsToPreventAdverseCons: Protective measures designed to shield individuals who file complaints from retaliation, further harm, or negative repercussions. These include, confidentiality protections, interim safety measures, anonymous reporting options, independent investigation processes, witness protection protocols, and legal safeguards that prohibit punitive actions against those who report misconduct in good faith.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:HumanRightsRequirementsFormPar: Efforts are extended to implement the relevant policies with Company’s Suppliers, Contractors, Company’s own and associated Foundations and others within the sphere of influence. Company’s Supplier’s Code of Conduct covers all aspects related to protection of human rights.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionsT: No major risks or concerns reported.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfCoverageAndImplementa: Water from STP & ETP is used for gardening & flushing purposes.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfProjectRelatedToReduc: (i) Solar Open Access for all locations of Praj in Maharashtra state is being explored. This will substantially reduce the Scope 2 emissions of Praj. (ii) Biogas unit is installed at some of the manufacturing facilities of the Company to process waste.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfWasteManagementPracti: The Company is into the business of manufacturing plants and machinery for industrial use. Metals are used in majority of the manufacturing process with a very small proportion of non-recyclable material. Scrap generated through Company’s operations is sold to recycling vendors. The percentage of recycling of scrap is 100%. No major use of hazardous and toxic chemicals. Generated waste is disposed through agencies which are duly approved by the respective local authorities.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheTradeAndIndustryChamb: The Sugar Technologists' Association of India
Federation of Indian Chambers of Commerce And Industry (FICCI)
Process Plant & Machinery Association of India (PPMA)
Council of EU Chambers of Commerce in India
E-PURE : An association of stakeholders of fuel ethanol industry in European Union
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsToReceive: So far there is no such case. In order to prevent such things we follow below mentioned practices : • Before starting any project, we interact with the beneficiaries, we understand their needs, we don’t force them to be a part of the project, their participation is totally voluntary • We ensure community ownership • We also ensure necessary due diligence of the NGO with whom we work
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsInPlaceTo:
Majority of our customers are industries. There are dedicated project managers for such industrial customers and proper escalation matrix is in place. Respective project manager or customer executive can log consumer / customer complaint online through customer portal. Complaints are then tracked for timely and satisfactory resolution.
Apart from this, Company carries out the Customer Satisfaction Survey periodically in order to understand overall customer feedback and to take suitable corrective actions.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfImpactOfDataBreachesE: Data breaches have demonstrated no significant impact on operations.
